Title: event.preventDefault is a no-op
Description: Line 66 in main.js: `event.preventDefault` is missing parentheses — should be `event.preventDefault()`. Currently does nothing.

Title: User agent setting case mismatch
Description: startup.js line 12 uses `settings.userAgent` but settings.js defines it as `settings.useragent` (lowercase). The user agent never actually gets applied.

Title: Stray backtick causing syntax issues
Description: Line 164 of app.js has a stray double-backtick (`` ` ``) that could cause runtime errors or silent failures.

Title: custombg.js uses wrong CSS property casing
Description: Uses `style.zindex` instead of `style.zIndex` (camelCase). The z-index is never applied so the custom background layering may break.

Title: LSDB dbResolve double-prefixes the key
Description: dbResolve calls `dbGetItem(LSDBPrefix + key)` and `dbSetItem(LSDBPrefix + key)` which double-applies the prefix since dbGetItem/dbSetItem already prepend LSDBPrefix.

Title: Theme sync index mismatch for glassmorphism
Description: syncsettingsui in ui.js maps 'darkcloud' to themeitemsdiv[1] but selecttheme maps index 1 to 'glassmorphism'. The active highlight doesn't match the selected theme.

Title: Last.fm credential injection vulnerability
Description: saveLastFmCredentials uses string interpolation to inject API key/secret directly into executeJavaScript. Special characters in input could break or exploit this.

Title: HTML typo: Prefrences
Description: 'Prefrences' is misspelled throughout index.html and sidebar — should be 'Preferences'.

Title: readfile status text typo
Description: Line 401 of app.js says 'Readed File' — should be 'Read File'.

Title: Unclosed HTML tags in loading screen
Description:
Line 523 of index.html has `
...

` — an unclosed `

` and a `

` used incorrectly inside it.

Title: contextIsolation is disabled
Description: contextIsolation: false with nodeIntegration: true exposes the full Node.js API to the renderer and any webview content. This is a major security risk.

Title: preload.js is empty and unused
Description: The preload script is empty. It should be used with contextBridge to safely expose only needed APIs to the renderer instead of disabling contextIsolation.

Title: updateCheck.js loaded from CDN at runtime
Description: index.html loads updateCheck.js from jsdelivr CDN. If the CDN or repo is compromised this script has full Node.js access. Should be bundled locally.

Title: Custom JS editor executes arbitrary code
Description: User-provided JS from the custom editor is stored in localStorage and executed via webview.executeJavaScript with no sandboxing or validation.

Title: webviewTag is deprecated
Description: The <webview> tag is deprecated in Electron. Consider migrating to BrowserView or webContents for better security and maintenance.

Title: Replace console.log IPC with proper IPC channels
Description: Communication between webview and renderer uses console.log messages parsed with string splitting. This is fragile and noisy. Use ipcRenderer/ipcMain or MessageChannel instead.

Title: Reduce infoticker polling frequency and logging
Description: infoticker.js fires every 1s and emits ~8 console.log messages per tick. This floods the console and wastes CPU. Use MutationObserver or reduce frequency.

Title: Debounce settings persistence
Description: Every settings change immediately calls updateLS() which writes all settings to localStorage. Should debounce to batch rapid changes.

Title: Lazy-load Ace editor scripts
Description: Ace editor JS is loaded from CDN on every app launch via index.html even when the user never opens the CSS/JS editor. Load it on demand.

Title: Cache lyrics API responses
Description: Lyrics are re-fetched from LRCLIB every time a song showcase opens or a song changes. Cache results in memory or localStorage to avoid redundant network calls.

Title: Adblocker initialized on every dom-ready
Description: ElectronBlocker.fromPrebuiltAdsAndTracking is called on every dom-ready event. Should initialize once on app-ready and reuse the blocker instance.

Title: Replace theme switch/case with a lookup map
Description: The theme loading in startup.js and syncsettingsui in ui.js both use verbose switch statements. A simple object map would be cleaner and easier to extend.

Title: Use const/let instead of implicit globals
Description: Multiple files use undeclared variables (result in LSDB.js; songtitle/url/state/time/bar in app.js/ui.js/SCI.js) which become implicit globals. Add proper declarations.

Title: Remove excessive console.log in production
Description: main.js and app.js have many debug console.log statements (e.g. 'window focused' / 'window blurred' / 'scrolling'). Add a debug flag or remove for production.

Title: Downloads go to app directory instead of user Downloads
Description: scdownloaderbtnreq saves to `${appdirectory}/Downloads/` inside the app folder. Should use Electron's app.getPath('downloads') or let the user pick a directory.

Title: Add error handling for DOM queries in plugins
Description: infoticker.js and SCI.js query SoundCloud DOM elements without null checks. If SC changes its layout these will throw and break the app silently.

Title: Add a linter and formatter
Description: No ESLint or Prettier config exists. Adding these would catch bugs like the missing parentheses and undeclared variables automatically.

Title: Modularize app.js
Description: app.js is a ~570-line monolith handling Discord RPC / lyrics / song showcase / downloader / media keys / keyboard shortcuts / Last.fm. Split into modules.

Title: Add unit and integration tests
Description: No test files or test framework exists. Critical logic like settings persistence / LSDB / lyrics parsing should have test coverage.

Title: Consistent code style across plugins
Description: Some plugins use semicolons and some don't. Variable naming is inconsistent (camelCase vs lowercase). Standardize with a shared config.

Title: System tray media info and controls
Description: The tray currently only shows Play/Pause and Skip. Add track title / artist display and a Previous Track option.

Title: Auto-update mechanism
Description: No auto-update functionality exists. Integrate electron-updater or Squirrel auto-update to notify and apply updates in-app.

Title: Minimize to tray instead of quitting
Description: Closing the window quits the app. Add an option to minimize to system tray and keep playing in the background.

Title: Keyboard shortcuts customization panel
Description: Shortcuts are hardcoded (Ctrl+R / F5 / Esc / media keys). Let users rebind these from the settings UI.

Title: Mini player / picture-in-picture mode
Description: A small floating window showing current track info and basic controls when the main window is minimized.

Title: Desktop notifications on track change
Description: Show a native OS notification with song title / artist / cover art when a new track starts playing.

Title: Equalizer or audio enhancement controls
Description: Add a built-in audio equalizer or bass boost / normalization using Web Audio API within the webview.

Title: Proxy support
Description: Listed in README TODO. Add proxy configuration in settings to route webview traffic through a user-specified proxy.

Title: Sleep timer
Description: Add a countdown timer that pauses playback after a set duration — useful for listening before sleeping.

Title: Queue management panel
Description: Show and reorder the current playback queue from within the BetterSoundCloud UI.

Title: Global search within app
Description: Add a search bar (Ctrl+K or Ctrl+L) that navigates directly to a SoundCloud search URL without opening the full settings panel.

Title: Linux and macOS distribution packages
Description: Listed in README TODO. Add electron-forge makers for DMG (macOS) / AppImage / deb / rpm (Linux) in forge.config.js.

Title: Offline listening / caching
Description: Listed in README TODO. Cache recently played tracks locally so they can be replayed without internet.

Title: Geo-restriction bypass
Description: Listed in README TODO. Attempt to bypass 'this song is not available in your country' errors via proxy or user-agent tricks.

Title: Enhanced shuffle algorithm
Description: Listed in README TODO. Override SoundCloud's default shuffle with a Fisher-Yates or weighted random that avoids repeats.

Title: Waveform visualization in fullscreen/showcase
Description: Listed in README TODO. Render the SoundCloud waveform data in the song showcase / fullscreen mode.

Title: Import/export settings and themes
Description: Let users export their settings / custom CSS / custom JS / theme choice to a file and import on another machine.

Title: Plugin marketplace or community theme browser
Description: Allow users to browse and install community-created themes and plugins from within the settings panel.

Title: Playback history log
Description: Keep a local history of played tracks with timestamps that users can browse and re-play.

Title: Scrobble history viewer for Last.fm
Description: Show recent Last.fm scrobbles inline in the app so users can verify their scrobbling is working.
